notes: More or less run perfectly out of the box with a 60Hz display. If running on a non-60Hz setup, input method (入力のレイテンシ) needs to be set to "Fast" (高速) or the game will run at the wrong speed. Mojibake can be fixed by running the game with the Steam launch options "LC_ALL=ja_JP.UTF-8 %command%", assuming you have the locale on your machine.
title: 東方紺珠伝 ～ Legacy of Lunatic Kingdom.

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box, no stuttering or input lag. Set launch option to "LANG=ja_JP.utf8 %command%" to fix gibberish in config menu dialoge.
